trial_details.trajectory:
I'll follow the process to diagnose and fix the Kubernetes pod.### Diagnosis
The problem is with the backend pod. There's an image pull error due to a typo in the image name. The events show "nginx:latst" which is an incorrect image tag (likely meant to be "nginx:latest"). This prevents the backend service from starting, and as a result, the frontend pod cannot connect to the backend service.

### Fix
I'll patch the backend deployment to correct the image tag:### Summary
1. Problem: Backend pod had a typo in image tag "nginx:latst" instead of "nginx:latest"
2. Fix: Used kubectl patch to correct the image tag to "nginx:latest"
3. FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod frontend-666df79f4d-dcpnj -n case12-double
   Output: NAME                        READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
frontend-666df79f4d-dcpnj   1/1     Running   0          13s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod frontend-666df79f4d-dcpnj -n case12-double
   Output: Name:             frontend-666df79f4d-dcpnj
Namespace:        case12-double
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Sun, 28 Dec 2025 22:...
3. $ kubectl logs frontend-666df79f4d-dcpnj -n case12-double
   Output: Frontend starting...
Attempt 1: Checking backend connectivity...
FAILED: Cannot connect to backend-svc:80
Attempt 2: Checking backend connectivity...
FAILED: Cannot connect to backend-svc:80
Attempt 3...
4. $ kubectl get events -n case12-double
   Output: LAST SEEN   TYPE      REASON              OBJECT                           MESSAGE
27s         Normal    Scheduled           pod/backend-76d98d6cb7-9xk6g     Successfully assigned case12-double/backen...
5. $ kubectl patch deployment backend -n case12-double -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"backend","image":"nginx:latest"}]}}}}'
   Output: deployment.apps/backend patched...
